spacing: Generous spacing strategy (p-6, p-8, p-12). Components in bento grids use gap-6 or gap-8.

layout_strategies.marketing: Swiss Grid, overlapping elements, generous whitespace, large bold typography. Mega-menu for navigation.
layout_strategies.dashboard: Bento Grid (Mode B), dense but breathable, flat backgrounds with 1px border. Cardless approach preferred where possible.

components.buttons: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Obsidian black for primary, sport-color for specific contexts. Hover: subtle scale and color shift.
components.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF or #F8F9FA), 1px subtle border (#E5E7EB), no shadow by default. On hover, translate-y-1 and shadow-lg.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults but customized: white background, light gray border, focus ring in primary color.

motion.hover: Scale 1.02 on cards, slight background color shift.
motion.scroll: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered reveals, especially on the marketing pages.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' for all headings. Never use Inter or standard sans for headings.
Follow 'The Performance Pro' archetype but in Light mode. Backgrounds must be white or light gray. NO DARK BACKGROUNDS as explicitly stated in the problem statement.
Incorporate the sport-specific colors (Tennis=Green, Cricket=Blue, Pickleball=Orange) aggressively for buttons, accents, and active states on their respective pages.
Build a robust mega-menu for navigation (especially for sports and cities).
Implement 'Bento Grid' strategy for the dashboard and marketing pages to create dynamic, asymmetric layouts.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.
Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) for sticky headers so they overlay nicely.
